forecasts.detailed: Scattered rain showers between midnight and 3am, then rain showers likely and patchy fog. Cloudy, with a low around 43. East wind 0 to 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

Patchy fog between 11pm and 1am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers between 1am and 2am, then rain showers likely and patchy fog. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 45. East wind 2 to 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 60%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

A chance of rain showers between 10pm and 2am, then rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 50. South wind 10 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 26 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a tenth and quarter of an inch possible.

Patchy fog and scattered rain showers before 3am, then rain showers likely and patchy fog between 3am and 5am, then rain and patchy fog. Cloudy, with a low around 43. East wind 5 to 10 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

Rain showers after 7pm. Cloudy, with a low around 48. South wind 6 to 9 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

Rain showers before 2am, then rain showers likely and patchy fog between 2am and 4am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers. Cloudy, with a low around 47. South wind 2 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.
